content: It's currently 12:18 pm. Weather is currently "35°C and Mostly Sunny" at my place. I am currently at home and thinking about you. Write a WhatsApp message to Chiku with lot of emojis.
Hey Chiku! 👋☀️ It's scorching here - 35°C and mostly sunny! 🥵 Just lounging at home and missing you tons! 🥰🥺 Hope you're having a good day! 🤗💖 Thinking of you! 😘
